Han De (йџ“еѕ·). Served Wei. Father to Han Ying, Yao, Qiong, and Qi. Died at Changshan facing Zhao Yun. Han De is a fictional character. Han De was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Han De lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
